content: Dopo aver manifestato i primi sintomi questa mattina, poco dopo sono risultata positiva al COVID-19 e ora sarò in quarantena per i prossimi 10 giorni.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Guybrush88 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:After experiencing symptoms for the first time this morning, I tested positive for COVID-19 shortly thereafter, and will
